content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility (Vol: 26.9%) with full participation (Breadth: 8/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom and Banking are leaders: TCELL (1W: +9.12% | 1M: +7.52%) ABOVE TREND, KONTR (1W: +24.58% | 1M: +10.00%) ABOVE TREND, AKBNK (1W: +14.04% | 1M: +4.34%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +10.49% | 1M: +4.86%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals and Transportation lag the most but remain positive: TUPRS (1W: -0.29% | 1M: +6.70%) CORRECTION, PGSUS (1W: +6.68% | 1M: +4.67%) ABOVE TREND, overall Energy & Chemicals (1W: +6.00% | 1M: +4.59%) showing relative underperformance.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +24.58% | 1M: +10.00%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +20.57% | 1M: +18.69%) ABOVE TREND; SAHOL (1W: +14.61% | 1M: +7.96%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +14.04% | 1M: +4.34%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +13.17% | 1M: +16.75%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
VESTL (1W: -2.75% | 1M: +0.64%) CORRECTION; TUPRS (1W: -0.29% | 1M: +6.70%) CORRECTION; GUBRF (1W: +1.41% | 1M: -6.53%) RECOVERY; TRALT (1W: +2.24% | 1M: -16.48%) RECOVERY; ULKER (1W: +2.47% | 1M: +6.85%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +24.58% | 1M: +10.00%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +20.57% | 1M: +18.69%) ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: +14.04% | 1M: +4.34%) ABOVE TREND; SAHOL (1W: +14.61% | 1M: +7.96%) ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: +12.32% | 1M: +5.51%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banks are outperforming on broad buying; AKBNK (1W: +14.04% | 1M: +4.34%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +10.49% | 1M: +4.86%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +11.86% | 1M: +5.06%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +12.32% | 1M: +5.51%) ABOVE TREND, VAKBN (1W: +12.20% | 1M: -1.63%) RECOVERY.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry and construction remain strong: EREGL (1W: +7.19% | 1M: +8.08%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +13.17% | 1M: +16.75%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +20.57% | 1M: +18.69%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +5.72% | 1M: -2.41%) RECOVERY.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy is mixed with cyclicals strong but selective weakness: SASA (1W: +10.55% | 1M: +19.09%) ABOVE TREND, SISE (1W: +7.82% | 1M: +13.11%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.29% | 1M: +6.70%) CORRECTION, PETKM (quant: high rank) showing positive signal.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on stance: overweight cyclical and rate-sensitive names (banks, heavy industry, select tech) while trimming lagging, defensive names; keep TUPRS and VESTL as tactical profit-taking candidates and maintain cash for event-driven entries.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +24.58% | 1M: +10.00%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, ASELS (1W: +20.57% | 1M: +18.69%) ABOVE TREND for defense/contract news, AKBNK (1W: +14.04% | 1M: +4.34%) ABOVE TREND on bank flows, SASA (1W: +10.55% | 1M: +19.09%) ABOVE TREND on commodity linkage, TUPRS (1W: -0.29% | 1M: +6.70%) CORRECTION for mean-reversion.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for flow continuation, Heavy Industry for earnings/exports momentum, Technology & Telecom for outsized moves (KONTR, TCELL).

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to weekly highs for continuation and any break below short-term support to signal profit-taking; catalysts include domestic monetary commentary, Q1 earnings updates, global risk sentiment and commodity moves (oil/steel) that can sway Energy and Heavy Industry names.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with normal volatility and unanimous sector gains; breadth confirms broad risk appetite. Prioritize cyclical leaders (banks, heavy industry, select tech) while watching TUPRS and VESTL for short-term corrections and monitor macro/catalyst flow for next-week rotation.
